problem_statement: Freeze how architecture decisions are materialized, referenced, and invalidated across harness runtime and repo-local blueprints.
boundary_decisions: architecture_freeze is a first-class harness artifact distinct from handoff.
handoff carries architecture_freeze_ref instead of duplicating the full freeze payload.
dependency_direction: project-manager requests freezes; architecture-expert defines them; downstream roles consume them.
runtime artifacts reference repo-local blueprints; blueprints do not move into harness runtime.
interface_freeze_points: architecture_freeze schema carries boundary, dependency, interface, ownership, NFR, and forbidden-shortcut fields.
blueprint_refs must include at least one repo-local .puml source drawing.
ownership_lifecycle_constraints: project-manager owns task phase transitions and propagates architecture_freeze refs through handoff.
decision blueprints leave the default read chain when status is superseded or obsolete.
nfr_constraints: repo-local blueprints remain versioned primary sources.
quality gates reject missing blueprint refs and inactive decision blueprints in runtime freeze artifacts.
forbidden_shortcuts: do not stuff full architecture freeze content into generic handoff artifacts.
do not treat superseded decision blueprints as active defaults.
tradeoffs: accept extra artifact wiring in exchange for explicit architecture governance and replayable evidence.
notes: COLLAB-023 freezes architecture artifact semantics and blueprint lifecycle governance.
